customCSS: .meadow-bg{position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;overflow:hidden}.meadow-pattern{position:absolute;top:-200px;left:-200px;right:-200px;bottom:-200px;background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='60' height='60' viewBox='0 0 60 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cg fill='%23806040' fill-opacity='0.06'%3E%3Cpath d='M15 8c-1.5 0-4 3-4 7s2.5 5 4 5 4-1.5 4-5-2.5-7-4-7z'/%3E%3Cpath d='M45 35c-1 0-3 2.5-3 5.5s2 4 3 4 3-1 3-4-2-5.5-3-5.5z'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='35' cy='12' r='1.2'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='8' cy='42' r='1'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='52' cy='52' r='0.8'/%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E");background-size:60px 60px;animation:meadow-drift 50s linear infinite}.meadow-grain{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='80' height='80' viewBox='0 0 80 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cg fill='%23806040' fill-opacity='0.03'%3E%3Ccircle cx='10' cy='10' r='0.8'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='50' cy='20' r='0.6'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='30' cy='50' r='0.7'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='70' cy='60' r='0.5'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='20' cy='70' r='0.6'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='60' cy='40' r='0.7'/%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E");background-size:80px 80px}@keyframes meadow-drift{0%{transform:translate(0,0)}100%{transform:translate(-60px,-60px)}}
